full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Sarah.

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 25 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 10 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 13 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 5x 10x10^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 5.4x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 11.9 | 8.45
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 5.5 | 5.47
 | viability [%] | 46.4 | 64.8
 | size [µm] | 9.6 | 8,8
2) | total [E7 cells/ml] | 11.8 | 9.51
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 5.82 | 5.05
 | viability [%] | 49.2 | 53.1
 | size [µm] | 9.8 | 8.3
Average | [E6 cells/ml] | 11.85 | 8.98
 | total [E6 cells] | 118.5 | 26.94
 | viability [%] | 9.7 | 58.95
